title: The Elusive Corporal
writer: Jacques Perret, Jean Renoir, Guy Lefranc
actors: Jean-Pierre Cassel, Claude Brasseur, O.E. Hasse
plot: An upper-class corporal from Paris is captured by the Germans when they invade France in 1940. Assisted and accompanied by characters as diverse as a morose dairy farmer, a waiter, a myopic intellectual, a working-class Parisian, ...
awards: Nominated for 1 BAFTA Award4 nominations total
